zh.lifeSummary: 當William Wofford於1537年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾帕廷加姆時，他的父親William Walford22歲，母親Sarah Mason19歲。他和Alice Jones至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1578年在他的家鄉享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: Wofford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Wolford  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Wolford
meanings: habitational name from Wolford in Warwickshire or Wolford Farm in Dunkeswell (Devon). The Warwickshire placename derives from Old English wulf ‘wolf’ + weard ‘watch, protection’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wulf ‘wolf’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Wofford was born in 1537, in Pattingham, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Walford, was 22 and his mother, Sarah Mason, was 19. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Alice Jones. He died in 1578, in his hometown, at the age of 41.

ko.lifeSummary: William Wofford(이)가 1537년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 패틴그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Walford(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Mason(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Alice Jones(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1578년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.
